---
pagetitle: "Workshop 2026 - Deep generative learning for geophysical inverse modelling"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}
[Invited Talk]{.page-header-badge .badge-upcoming}

# Deep generative learning for geophysical inverse modelling

[Leonardo Azevedo · Invited Speaker]{.tagline}

::: {.meta}
[Day 2]{} [June 2, 2026]{} [AIEPS Workshop 2026]{} [25 min + 5 min]{}
:::

::: {.actions}
[Back to Programme](../2026.qmd#programme){.btn-act .secondary}
[Speaker Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/leonardo-azevedo-53522716/){.btn-act .primary target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.content-body .session-detail}

## Abstract

Geophysical inversion allows predicting the spatial distribution of subsurface rock properties from geophysical data. This is a challenging inverse, nonlinear with non-unique solution problem. We introduce deep generative learning as a flexible way to perform geophysical inversion accounting for multiple data assimilation, uncertainties and a priori geological knowledge. Several methods are introduced with synthetic and real case applications.

## Speaker Bio

[Leonardo Azevedo](https://www.linkedin.com/in/leonardo-azevedo-53522716/) is an invited speaker at AIEPS 2026 and will present online.

## Materials and Images

- Slides: To be added.
- Related links: To be added.
- Images: To be added.

:::
